transcription.text:
Okay, so we're close to Ben Tang Market now, which is notorious for selling loads of genuine fakes. Not only is it incredibly hot in here, it is very busy.
So it seems like there's an abundance of like fake handbags, sunglasses, trainers, pretty much everything you could need in a fake version. So apparently it's part of the culture here that they love to barter. Never just
what they ask for straight away. Try to bring them a little bit down respectfully, not too much. Don't want to insult them.

segments.text: Okay, so we're close to Ben Tang Market now, which is notorious for selling loads of genuine fakes. Not only is it incredibly hot in here, it is very busy.

So it seems like there's an abundance of like fake handbags, sunglasses, trainers, pretty much everything you could need in a fake version. So apparently it's part of the culture here that they love to barter. Never just
what they ask for straight away. Try to bring them a little bit down respectfully, not too much. Don't want to insult them.

judge.characteristic_vi: Chợ Bến Thành nổi tiếng với việc bán nhiều mặt hàng giả chất lượng cao như túi xách, kính râm và giày thể thao. Chợ rất đông đúc và nóng bức. Khách hàng nên trả giá để có được mức giá tốt nhất.
judge.reason: Bằng chứng cung cấp thông tin cụ thể về các loại hàng hóa được bán (hàng giả), không khí (nóng, đông đúc) và văn hóa mua sắm (trả giá), tất cả đều liên quan trực tiếp đến POI.
evidence_quotes: notorious for selling loads of genuine fakes.
incredibly hot in here, it is very busy.
abundance of like fake handbags, sunglasses, trainers
part of the culture here that they love to barter.
